raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check-in","name":"What's felt most clear or unclear for you in week two, Riley?","description":"Lets Riley set the current onboarding picture before the conversation gets specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team contact","name":"Who have you actually had enough live time with so far?","description":"Surfaces whether he is getting enough direct contact to build the team map, not just reading it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership edges","name":"Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy?","description":"Finds the places where he could accidentally overstep or hold back because the boundary is not concrete yet.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Good looks like","name":"What does good look like for your part of the backend work right now?","description":"Checks whether he has a usable picture of expectations and outcomes for his current scope.","purpose":"competency","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Context moments","name":"When do you find yourself needing more context before you move?","description":"Identifies the decision points where he should slow down and ask instead of filling gaps himself.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Architecture assumptions","name":"What kinds of architecture calls feel easiest to misread here?","description":"Surfaces where his internal model may diverge from team norms or established patterns.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Incident picture","name":"What have you picked up so far about incident expectations here?","description":"Checks whether he has a concrete mental model of how incidents are handled and what his role is in them.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support ask","name":"What would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?","description":"Converts missing context into concrete onboarding support without assuming the answer.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Useful introductions","name":"Who would be most useful for you to spend live time with next?","description":"Helps line up the next relationship that will improve his map of how the team actually works.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Steady next steps","name":"What should we line up before our next check-in?","description":"Closes the meeting by turning the discussion into concrete follow-up and support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
